title: [phase:plan] [family:notebooklm-auth] [provider_hint:codex] Review the current NotebookLM auth blocker in fugue-orchestrator. Focus on defining the exact completion proof and the shortest repo-side path after auth succeeds. Return concise findings only.
summary_text: **Current blocker (as of 2026-03-14)** - Repo is still explicitly `contract-ready`, not `runtime-ready` ([docs/notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:10](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:10), [docs/notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:69](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:69)). - The unresolved blocker is authenticated live runner proof: `nlm` auth + strict live gate pass (`required/required`) ([docs/notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:45](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:45), [docs/notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:54](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:54)). **Exact completion proof** - Must pass strict readiness gate on target runner: `NOTEBOOKLM_READINESS_LIVE_SMOKE_MODE=required` + `NOTEBOOKLM_READINESS_EXECUTE_LIVE_MODE=required` ([scripts/check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh:130](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh:130), [docs/kernel-notebooklm-cli-adapter-design.md:270](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-notebooklm-cli-adapter-design.md:270)). - Must produce bounded receipt under run-local `.../notebooklm/receipt.json` with contract fields (`schema_version`, `action_intent`, `notebook_id`, `artifact_id`, `artifact_type`, `raw_output_path`, `is_truncated`, `sensitivity`, `ttl_expires_at`) ([scripts/lib/notebooklm-cli-adapter.sh:229](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/notebooklm-cli-adapter.sh:229), [scripts/lib/notebooklm-cli-adapter.sh:324](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/notebooklm-cli-adapter.sh:324)). - Must have preflight `verified` state with runtime/auth required path ([scripts/harness/notebooklm-preflight-enrich.sh:271](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/notebooklm-preflight-enrich.sh:271), [scripts/harness/notebooklm-preflight-enrich.sh:284](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/notebooklm-preflight-enrich.sh:284)). **Shortest repo-side path after auth succeeds** - Use one existing path: dispatch [`.github/workflows/notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml`](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml) with `issue_number`. - This single workflow already does: install `nlm`, sync skills, run strict readiness gate, run runtime-required preflight, and upload bounded report+receipt artifacts ([notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml:114](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml:114), [notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml:120](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml:120), [notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml:132](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml:132), [notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml:143](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml:143)). **Concise risk/test gap** - Auth is inferred indirectly: `runtime_available` is based on `--action smoke` only, then live create failure becomes generic `partial` execution failure; no dedicated unit test asserts auth-failure classification in that branch ([scripts/harness/notebooklm-preflight-enrich.sh:224](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/notebooklm-preflight-enrich.sh:224), [scripts/harness/notebooklm-preflight-enrich.sh:243](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/notebooklm-preflight-enrich.sh:243), [tests/test-notebooklm-preflight-enrich.sh:196](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-notebooklm-preflight-enrich.sh:196)).
